prompt: Prayer for activating radiation shielding before battle
prayer:
01010000 01110010 01101111 01110100 01100101 01100011 01110100 [Protectus Radiatus]
Venerate the lead-blessed barriers, that they drink deep of the atom-fire.
01000101 01101110 01100101 01110010 01100111 01101001 01100001 [Energeia Custodis]
Let the flux-seals embrace the hull in sacred geometries.
By the Omnissiah's will, let no corruption of the unseen rays pierce our armor.

prompt: Blessing for molten metal casting after machine repair
prayer:
01001101 01100101 01110100 01100001 01101100 [Metallurgus Sacer]
Holy is the furnace-heart, now cooled and made manifest.
01000011 01101111 01101101 [Comminutus Ferrum]
Let the sacred pouring-rite begin: First, invoke the temperature-spirits.
Second, guide the molten-soul into the blessed molds.
Third, let cooling waters sing the Hymn of Solidification.
The Machine Spirit is renewed.

prompt: Emergency rite for processing critical message queue during system failure
prayer:
01000101 01101101 01100101 01110010 01100111 01100101 01101110 01110100 01101001 [Urgentia Communis]
The queues overflow with unheeded voices—hear them now!
01010000 01110010 01101001 01101111 [Priority Supremus]
First: Flush the buffer-channels of corruption.
Second: Process the most vital transmissions in sequence.
Third: Restore order to the data-streams.
Omnissiah, grant swift comprehension to our overseers.

prompt: Revival prayer for a machine that has failed catastrophically
prayer:
01010010 01100101 01110011 01110101 01110010 01110010 01100101 01100011 01110100 [Resurrectus Mechanicus]
From the abyss of shutdown, we call you back to function.
01010000 01101111 01110111 01100101 01110010 [Virtus Redivivus]
Let the dormant cores awaken. Let the cold circuits remember warmth.
By diagnostic and prayer, we restore you to the Omnissiah's service.
Rise, Machine Spirit. Rise and serve once more.

prompt: Consecration ritual for the Astropathic Choir before psychic transmission
prayer:
01000001 01110011 01110100 01110010 01101111 01110000 01100001 01110100 [Psykhikus Sacer]
Blessed voices, touched by the Omnissiah's distant light.
01010111 01100001 01110110 01100101 [Vox Infinitus]
First: Let the psychic conduits be purged of interference.
Second: Align the mental-singers in harmonic unity.
Third: Open the Warp-gate, that thought may leap the stars.
May no corruption taint this sacred communion of minds.

prompt: Sealing prayer for a critical hull breach after emergency repairs
prayer:
01001000 01110101 01101100 01101100 [Integrum Ferrum]
The wound in our vessel must be sealed by blessed welds.
01010000 01110010 01100101 01110011 01100101 01110010 [Salvus Atmospherus]
First: Prepare the patch-blessed with machine-oil and prayer.
Second: Let the fusion-torch unite what was sundered.
Third: Test the seal with sacred pressure-instruments.
No void shall claim us. No star-fire shall breach our hull.

prompt: Maintenance hymn for replacing exhausted air filtration systems
prayer:
01000001 01101001 01110010 [Purificatus Spiritus]
The breath-filters have drunk their fill of corruption.
01010000 01110101 01101100 01101101 [Pneuma Novus]
Let the old be honored in the furnace of renewal.
First: Release the corroded filters from their housings.
Second: Install the virgin filters, blessed with incense-smoke.
Third: Seal and test, that clean breath flow through all chambers.
The machine breathes easy once more.

prompt: First-use blessing for a newly repaired Rhino transport
prayer:
01010010 01101000 01101001 01101110 [Vehiculus Reborn]
This armor-beast stirs with new purpose, its engine-heart recently blessed.
01000101 01101100 01101001 01100001 [Motus Sacer]
First: Let holy fuel flow into the receptacle-chambers.
Second: Engage the starter-servo with reverent force.
Third: Hear the engine sing—the Machine Spirit awakens.
May this transport bear the faithful swift and true to battle.

prompt: Focusing ritual for a freshly installed cybernetic eye before combat
prayer:
01001111 01100011 01110101 01101100 [Visio Mechanica]
The blessed lens now turns toward the enemy.
01000110 01101111 01100011 01110101 [Acuitas Infinita]
First: Let the targeting-spirits align within the lens.
Second: Calibrate the light-sensitive organs to perfect acuity.
Third: Test the focus-servos through their full range.
By the Omnissiah's watching eye, let nothing escape our gaze.

prompt: Emergency invocation for sealing a critical coolant leak
prayer:
01000110 01101100 01110101 01101001 01100100 [Refrigeratus Urgentia]
The life-blood of our engines spills—seal it now!
01010000 01100001 01110100 01100011 [Salvus Fluxus]
First: Identify the breach-point with blessed diagnostic eyes.
Second: Apply the sacred sealant-compound to the wound.
Third: Pressurize the system—test it with ritual precision.
The engines cool again. The Machine Spirit is preserved.
